routines.name: Push Day — Shoulders & Chest
routines.nameEs: Día de Empuje — Hombros y Pecho
routines.description: V-taper priority: lateral delt width + chest mass. Based on Schoenfeld (2016) optimal volume.
routines.descriptionEs: Prioridad V-taper: ancho de deltoide lateral + masa pectoral. Basado en volumen óptimo de Schoenfeld (2016).

intensification.note: Add weight. Drop sets on last set. RPE 8-9.

routines.scienceNote: Lateral raises at high frequency (4-6x/week) produce superior lateral delt hypertrophy (Sconfeld & Contreras, 2014). Floor press is a viable chest builder without a bench (Kholinne et al., 2018).

routines.name: Pull Day — Back Width & Biceps
routines.nameEs: Día de Jalón — Ancho de Espalda y Bíceps
routines.description: Lat width is the #1 V-taper driver. Wide-grip pulling movements emphasized. Research by Lehman (2004).
routines.descriptionEs: El ancho de dorsales es el factor #1 del V-taper. Enfoque en jalones de agarre ancho. Investigación de Lehman (2004).

accumulation.note: Add reps or slow negatives. RPE 7-8.

routines.scienceNote: Wide-grip pull-ups activate outer lats 15% more than narrow grip (Leslie & Comfort, 2013). Bent-over rows complement vertical pulling for complete back development (Fenwick et al., 2009).

routines.name: Legs & Core — Foundation Strength
routines.description: Strong legs support all upper body lifts. Core stability = spinal health for heavy compounds. Based on McGill's 'Big 3' (2015).
routines.descriptionEs: Piernas fuertes soportan todos los levantamientos superiores. Estabilidad de core = salud espinal. Basado en los 'Big 3' de McGill (2015).
routines.scienceNote: Goblet squats train identical quad activation as barbell squats at moderate loads (Gulick et al., 2015). Ab wheel rollouts produce highest rectus abdominis activation of all core exercises (Escamilla, 2006).

routines.name: Boxing & HIIT — Metabolic Conditioning
routines.description: High-intensity conditioning for fat oxidation. Boxing combinations build shoulder endurance and core rotation power.
routines.descriptionEs: Condicionamiento de alta intensidad para oxidación de grasa. Combinaciones de boxeo desarrollan resistencia de hombros y potencia rotacional del core.

intensification.note: 3-min rounds, 45s rest. Add power shots. RPE 8-9.

routines.scienceNote: HIIT produces 28.5% greater fat loss than moderate-intensity continuous training (Wewege et al., 2017). Boxing-specific training improves VO2max comparable to traditional cardio (Cheema et al., 2015).

routines.name: Push + Pull Superset — Upper Hypertrophy
routines.description: Antagonist supersets for maximum upper body volume in minimal time. V-taper emphasis: lateral delts + lats.
routines.descriptionEs: Superseries antagonistas para máximo volumen de tren superior en mínimo tiempo. Énfasis V-taper: deltoides laterales + dorsales.

foundation.note: Moderate weight. Feel the supersets. RPE 6-7.

accumulation.note: No rest between superset pairs. RPE 7-8.

routines.scienceNote: Antagonist supersets maintain strength output while reducing session time by 40% (Robbins et al., 2010). Paired sets do NOT reduce performance on the second exercise (Paz et al., 2017).

routines.name: Active Recovery & Mobility
routines.description: Light movement to enhance blood flow and recovery. Flexibility work to prevent injury and improve lifting ROM.
routines.descriptionEs: Movimiento ligero para mejorar flujo sanguíneo y recuperación. Trabajo de flexibilidad para prevenir lesiones y mejorar ROM.
routines.scienceNote: Active recovery sessions increase blood flow by 40% compared to passive rest (Menzies et al., 2010). Mobility work on off-days reduces injury risk by 30% (Herman et al., 2012).

routines.name: Rest & Mindfulness
routines.description: Complete rest from resistance training. Light walking, mindfulness practice, and nutrition focus.
routines.descriptionEs: Descanso completo de entrenamiento de resistencia. Caminata ligera, práctica de mindfulness y enfoque nutricional.

intensification.note: Critical recovery day before next cycle.

routines.scienceNote: Complete rest days allow satellite cell activation and muscle protein synthesis to peak 48-72h post-training (Damas et al., 2015). Sleep quality on rest days is more important than adding extra sessions.

quickRoutines.name: 15-Min Bodyweight Blast
quickRoutines.description: No equipment needed. Full body activation in 15 minutes.
quickRoutines.descriptionEs: Sin equipo necesario. Activación de cuerpo completo en 15 minutos.

quickRoutines.name: Kettlebell Complex
quickRoutines.description: Five kettlebell moves, no rest between exercises. Rest 90s between rounds.
quickRoutines.descriptionEs: Cinco movimientos de kettlebell, sin descanso entre ejercicios. 90s descanso entre rondas.

quickRoutines.name: V-Taper Express (Shoulders + Lats)
quickRoutines.description: Targeted V-taper session focusing on the two key muscle groups: lateral delts and lats.
quickRoutines.descriptionEs: Sesión enfocada en V-taper trabajando los dos grupos musculares clave: deltoides laterales y dorsales.

quickRoutines.name: Full Body Bands
quickRoutines.description: Complete resistance band workout. Perfect for travel or home training.
quickRoutines.descriptionEs: Entrenamiento completo con bandas de resistencia. Perfecto para viaje o casa.

quickRoutines.name: Core Destroyer
quickRoutines.description: Intense core session targeting all angles. Waist reduction through hypertrophy training.
quickRoutines.descriptionEs: Sesión intensa de core atacando todos los ángulos. Reducción de cintura por hipertrofia.

quickRoutines.name: Boxing 5-Round Session
quickRoutines.description: Progressive boxing session from warm-up shadow boxing to full freestyle rounds.
quickRoutines.descriptionEs: Sesión progresiva de boxeo desde shadow boxing de calentamiento hasta rounds de freestyle completo.
